subject: Action required: unusual sign-in activity on your account

findings.description: SPF failed: sending IP not authorised for the envelope domain.
DMARC failed: message not aligned/authenticated for the From domain.

findings.detail: Display name 'Microsoft Account Team' cites 'microsoft', but sender domain is micros0ft.com
findings.description: Display name impersonates a known brand the sender domain doesn't own.
Sender domain is a homoglyph/typosquat of a known brand domain.

findings.detail: Link text implies ['live.com', 'microsoft.com', 'microsoftonline.com', 'office.com', 'office365.com'] but href resolves to account-verify.ru: https://micros0ft.com.account-verify.ru/login
findings.description: Visible link text implies a different domain than the actual href.

findings.detail: Credential/account-verification language paired with an outbound link
findings.description: Account/credential-verification language paired with an outbound link.

findings.detail: Urgency / pressure language detected in the message body
findings.description: Urgency / pressure language to provoke a hasty action.
